'''Rosemari Pressor Tabory''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was the sister of [[Jorad Pressor|Jorad]], and the mother of [[Evlyn Tabory|Evlyn]]. She grew up aboard the wreckage of ''[[Outbound Flight Project]]'' and eventually became a teacher for the young people of the colony. Both Rosemari and Jorad went to great lengths to conceal the [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitivity]] of Evlyn from Colony Director [[Chas Uliar]], as he would sentence her to a life of isolation in [[Dreadnaught-Three|''D-Three'']].<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />

After the remains of ''Outbound Flight'' were recovered, Rosemari and Evlyn went to live in the [[Empire of the Hand]] with the rest of the evacuees.<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />

==Behind the scenes==
In the novel [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']], the name of Jorad's sister was given as [[Katarin Pressor|Katarin]].<ref name="Outbound Flight" /> Whether Rosemari is the same person as Katarin or is another sister born after the crash is unknown. However, ''Survivor's Quest'' implies that she was born after the crash.<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />
